The French Dispatch (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,124,375Details
International Box Office $31,262,788
Worldwide Box Office $47,387,163
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $222,693
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $994,015
Total $1,216,708
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A collection of stories from the final issue of an American magazine published in a fictional 20th-century French city.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,348,804 (8.4% of total gross)
Legs:6.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:52 opening theaters/1,225 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,956,468

Video Release: December 14th, 2021 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for graphic nudity, some sexual references and language.

Running Time: 108 minutes

Languages: English, French
